description: Physics and engineering analysis using Lcapy, SciPy, and Cantera. Covers circuit analysis, transfer functions, impedance, Laplace transforms, and thermodynamics.
use_cases: Analyze an RLC circuit and find its transfer function
Compute the response of a control system to a step input
Model thermodynamic properties of a gas mixture
Simulate heat transfer in a solid
exclusions: Pure symbolic algebra without physics context
example_prompts: Find the impedance of a series RLC circuit at frequency f
Compute the transfer function for a low-pass RC filter
Model the temperature rise in a metal rod exposed to a heat source
